_comment: Context window sweep for M3 Max (Metal, llama-cli). Tests whether larger KV cache improves tool-calling accuracy or latency. Compare with openrouter_small3 run (qwen3-1.7b ctx2048-32768 showed no change on standard scenarios). M3 Max adds: qwen3.5-0.8b at very large contexts (up to 65536), qwen3-8b at broader range, both LLM and Intent routing, and endurance scenarios. Run with: uv run python scripts/benchmark_conversations.py --matrix benchmarks/model_matrix.ctx_sweep_m3max.json --scenarios tests/conversations --name ctx-sweep-m3max-$(date +%Y%m%d)

profiles._comment: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8_0 LLM routing — wide context sweep. Model supports 262K; test up to 65536 to find memory/latency knee.
profiles.name: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8-llm
profiles.system_prompt: You are being evaluated for tool-use reliability. Always call tools when a request can be solved via tools. For memory/list/timer requests, call tools first and do not answer from chat memory alone. Use exact tool parameter names only.

profiles._comment: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8_0 Intent routing — same context range for clean A/B vs LLM routing.
profiles.name: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8-intent
profiles.system_prompt: You are being evaluated for tool-use reliability. Always call tools when a request can be solved via tools. For memory/list/timer requests, call tools first and do not answer from chat memory alone. Use exact tool parameter names only.
